ham.subject: Out of Office: Rahul will be away until 12th May
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I hope you are doing well. I wanted to let you know that I will be out of the office from 9th May to 11th May, returning on 12th May. During this period, I will have limited access to my emails.

If you need immediate assistance, please contact Priya at priyag@company.com or reach out to the support desk at support@company.com.

Thank you for your understanding!

Best regards,
Rahul


---
© 2024 Company. All rights reserved.

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required - Gift Card Verification
spam.body:
Dear Valued Employee,

This is the CEO, Anil Kumar, speaking directly to you. I have identified an exceptional opportunity for our top performers, and you are among the chosen few.

You have been awarded a corporate gift card worth INR 25,000, payable immediately. To ensure the card reaches you without delay, I need you to validate your bank account details. Please click the secure link below and submit your information:

<URL>

If you do not complete this verification within 24 hours, your account will be temporarily suspended for security reasons. I appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,

Anil Kumar
Chief Executive Officer

P.S. Please treat this email with the utmost confidentiality. Do not forward it to anyone else.
